title: user — validation rules
description: Four custom Laravel validation rules published by UserServiceProvider::boot() so any FormRequest / Data class can validate profile-adjacent fields. Composes the compliance floor for `age_meets_min` — the tenant setting is clamped up to the region's COPPA / GDPR minimum before comparison.

rules.name: valid_e164_phone
rules.description: Ensures the value is a valid E.164 international phone number. Accepts `+` prefix + 1–15 digits, no separators. Delegates to `giggsey/libphonenumber-for-php` for the country-aware parse + validate step.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid international phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155552671).

rules.name: valid_iana_timezone
rules.description: Ensures the value is a member of PHP's `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()` — the full IANA tz database. Rejects deprecated aliases (e.g. `US/Pacific`) in strict mode.

params.name: strict
params.description: When true, deprecated IANA aliases are rejected.

rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo).

rules.name: valid_bcp47_locale
rules.description: Ensures the value is a syntactically valid BCP-47 language tag AND (in the default `tenant_enabled_only` mode) resolves to a `TenantLocale where is_enabled=true` on the caller's tenant. Pass `any` to accept any BCP-47 tag from the platform catalogue.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a language enabled for this tenant.

rules.name: age_meets_min
rules.description: Compares the value (interpreted as a date-of-birth) against the effective compliance minimum age resolved by `auth::CompliantAgePolicy::resolveEffectiveMinimum($region)`. The `override` argument names a tenant setting whose value is clamped UP by the compliance floor — tenants may raise the minimum but never lower it. Rejects when the DOB puts the subject under the resolved floor.

params.name: override_setting
params.description: Optional dotted setting path (e.g. `athletes.portal.min_login_age`). When set, the rule reads the tenant setting AND clamps to at least the compliance floor before comparing.

rules.default_message: The :attribute puts the subject under the minimum age of :min for this jurisdiction.
rules.compliance_note: Delegates to `auth::CompliantAgePolicy` which factors COPPA (US, floor 13) + GDPR per-country (13–16 depending on country) + FERPA (US, educational records opt-in). Every rejection is written to `audits` with severity=info.
